judgeReasoning: Excellent separation of completed vs active work. The 7 completed topics are clearly closed and won't distract. The active book-sourcing-review section is detailed and actionable — agent knows exactly what's wrong and what to build next. The pending-action is specific (convert to JSON, update 4 handlers, add constraints). Only minor weakness: could be slightly more concise in completed topics (e.g., soul-evil-hook details could compress further), but this doesn't meaningfully hurt usability.
